mapper.sql: id, tag_name, tag_type, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into `skill_tag` (tag_name, tag_type, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{tagName}, #{tagType}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update `skill_tag` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from `user` where developer_skill_tag_ids is not null and replace(developer_skill_tag_ids, ' ', '') regexp concat('(^|\\[|,)', #{id}, '(,|\\]|$)')
select from `skill_tag` order by sort_order asc, id asc
select from `skill_tag` where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, id asc
